readers.title: Big Splash
readers.character_sheet: Character reference sheet of a plump round cartoon house cat with soft grey-and-white fur and huge round amber eyes, sitting in a white bathtub: the same character shown three times - front view, side view, and a happy expression - standing apart on a plain white background, model sheet, turnaround, consistent character design, same colours and proportions. colored hand-drawn pen-and-ink, fine crosshatch, whimsical Dr. Seuss children's-book style, big googly eyes. plain white background. no text, no words, no letters --ar 3:2
readers.cover_prompt: the plump grey-and-white cat with big amber eyes, in a white bathtub making a giant cartoon SPLASH of water arcing everywhere, the splash and bubbles large and filling the frame. colored hand-drawn pen-and-ink, fine crosshatch, whimsical Dr. Seuss children's-book style, big googly eyes, plain white background. no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no captions, no speech bubbles, no border, no watermark. --ar 1:1

a huge wall of water erupting up out of a white bathtub, the big SPLASH dominant and central, the soggy cat at its base. colored hand-drawn pen-and-ink, fine crosshatch, whimsical Dr. Seuss children's-book style, big googly eyes, plain white background. no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no captions, no speech bubbles, no border, no watermark. --ar 1:1
